# terrible_community_general_snap_alias (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against

### Optional

- `alias` (String) Aliases to be created or removed.
- `name` (String) Name of the snap.
- `state` (String) Desired state of the alias.

### Read-Only

- `snap_aliases` (String) The snap aliases after execution. If called in check mode, then the list represents the state before execution.
- `version` (String) Versions of snap components as reported by `snap version`.
